notes:
## What's Changed
* Merge v1.24.x into main by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/32
* fix(memory): restructure _create_tables to prevent cross-table reference errors by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/33
* ci: stabilize macOS notarization in release workflow by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/35
* ci: fix notarization timeout handling in release workflow by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/37
* v1.24.3: fix inline comments in .env causing startup crash by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/39
* chore: bump version to 1.24.3 by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/40
* chore: sync all version files to 1.24.3 by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/41
* fix(test): remove stale tests for deprecated extract_quick_facts by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/42
* ci(dryrun): align release-dryrun.yml with release.yml by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/43
* fix(ci): resolve lint, test collection and assertion failures by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/44
* chore: merge v1.24.x into main with dual-arch macOS release fixes by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/45
* chore: merge v1.24.x into main with release CI hardening by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/46
* fix(chat): avoid misleading backend-offline network errors by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/48
* docs(readme): use gif for desktop quick setup preview by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/49
* fix(setup-center): localize memory label and refine onboarding checkbox visuals by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/50
* docs(assets): refresh desktop terminal screenshots by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/51
* docs(readme-cn): use gif quick setup preview by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/52
* docs(readme): remove badge underline artifacts in EN/CN by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/53
* merge: sync v1.24.x fixes into main by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/54
* fix(setup-center): prevent empty chat model list on startup by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/55
* fix(env): enforce project-owned Python and add China mirror fallback by @SimYng in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/56

## New Contributors
* @SimYng made their first contribution in https://github.com/openakita/openakita/pull/32

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openakita/openakita/compare/v1.24.2...v1.24.4
